waffle-with-cream-cheese-and-smashed-ber.name: Waffle With Cream Cheese And Smashed Berries
instructions: Toast a waffle and smear with cream cheese. Using a fork, smash raspberries, blueberries, or blackberries on top of cream cheese. Drizzle with honey or agave.

walnut-bread-with-honey-teleculinaria.name: Walnut Bread With Honey
instructions: Start by biting the nut kernel. Bring a pot to the fire with the oil, sugar, water, honey, cinnamon, sweet grass and a pinch of salt. Let it boil and then add the flour.
Remove from the fire and stir with a spoon until everything is well involved. Take it back to the fire and move until the dough gets out of the pot. Remove and wrap the nut kernel.
Mold small breads with the previous dough, put on trays and put it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for 15 minutes or until they are golden. Remove, let it cool and serve.

instructions: 1. 3 rub the egg yolk in a deep bowl.
2. Add milk, powder sugar and carbon and continue to slate.
3. Add and mix the flour to the clay.
4. Adding and kneaded margarine.
5.  Hamuru 10 dakika dinlendirin.
6. Remove egg size parts from dough and round.
7. By opening each one with roller, inceltip walnut, raisin and cinnamon serpin.
8. Wrap the edges in the roll and gently bend the edges of the month shape.
9. Remove the remaining egg yolk on the lubricated tray.
10. Bake for 30 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 170 degree.
11. 11. Serve after cooling.
12. To add a different flavor to the moon dough, you can also add drawn nuts, Antep nuts and almonds.

walnut-pie-with-dough-teleculinaria.name: Walnut Pie With Dough
walnut-pie-with-dough-teleculinaria.original_name: Tarte de noz com massa caseira

ingredients.item: 200 g de miolo de noz grosseiramente partido

instructions: Prepare the dough: put the soft butter and sugar in a bowl and beat until everything is off-white. Pack the eggs and wrap them. Then add the lemon zest, flour and yeast and wrap until everything is well connected.
Garnish a tart with butter and sprinkle with flour. Finely extend the anterior mass and line with it the tarteira. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 15 minutes.
Prepare the filling: place the butter, milk and sugar in a pot and bring it to the heat until boiling. Add the broken nuts and wrap.
Spread the walnuts in the tart, on the base of dough, and put it back in the oven until the pie is brown. Remove, let it cool and serve.

walnut-broccoli-and-cauliflower-salad-le.name: Walnut, Broccoli And Cauliflower Salad
instructions: 1. Brokoli and carnflower parate.
2. Taking brocoli and carnuts to the steam apparatus & sprinkle dust sugar on the car.
3. Cook 5-6 minutes.
4. Take the vegetables you cooked in the salad.
5. In the form of fine ring to the car.
6. Olive oil, balzamic vinegar, lemon juice, salt and pepper to a deep bowl and mix well.
7. Discover and serve the salad of the sauce you prepared.

warm-chicken-and-swiss-chard-salad.name: Warm Chicken And Swiss Chard Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until darkened slightly, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.
Meanwhile, season chicken with salt; set aside. Remove ribs and stems from Swiss chard leaves. Tear leaves into 3" pieces. Cut thicker ends of stems on a diagonal into 1" pieces; discard thin ends.
Combine shallot, lemon zest, lemon juice, vinegar, and cumin seeds in a large bowl; toss to coat. Season vinaigrette with salt.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken thighs, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about 5 minutes. Turn and cook until golden brown on other side and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board; reserve skillet with pan juices. Let chicken rest 5 minutes, then cut into 1" pieces. Whisk pan juices and 4 Tbsp. oil into vinaigrette.

Cook Swiss chard stems in a large pot of generously salted boiling water until slightly tender, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer stems to bowl with vinaigrette; toss well. Working in batches if needed, cook Swiss chard leaves until just wilted and bright green, 15–30 seconds. Drain leaves and let cool slightly. Squeeze out as much liquid as possible. Separate leaves and add to vinaigrette along with dates, olives, and chicken; toss well.
Transfer salad to plates; drizzle with oil and top with almonds.

what-it-is-and-how-to-make-a-chilean-com.name: What It Is And How To Make A Chilean Completo
what-it-is-and-how-to-make-a-chilean-com.original_name: Qué es y cómo hacer un Completo Chileno

ingredients.item: 1 pan de completo o hot dog

instructions: Cooking hot dogs with boiling water for about 5- 7 minutes till they are hot. If you prefer a smoked touch, you can also cook them slightly on a grill. Reserve.
Piece tomato into small squares (brunoise) Reserve.
Cut the avocado in half, remove the bone and remove his pulp with a spoon. Triture with a fork and add salt to taste. Reserve.
Take the complete bread and make a longitudinal cut at the top. Put the sausage in the centre. Add minced tomato and crushed avocado with a fork or plate.
Add mayonnaise to taste and if you want other tights, such as ketchup, mustard or aji if you want to have a hot touch. Serves immediately.

white-bread.name: White Bread
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in 1/2 cup warm water. Add remaining water, dry milk, oil, sugar, salt, and 3 cups of flour; beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 3 minutes, or until smooth. Stir in enough remaining flour to form a soft dough.

Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface. Knead until smooth and elastic, about 6 to 8 minutes. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease surface. Cover the bowl with a damp cloth. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Punch the dough down, and divide in half. Shape into loaves. Place in two greased 9 X 5 x 3 inch loaf pans. Grease the tops of the loaves, and cover with a damp cloth. Let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
Bake at 191°C (190 degrees C) for 35 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove bread from pans to cool on wire racks. Brush with melted butter or margarine.

wild-rice-salad-with-corn-blueberries-an.name: Wild Rice Salad With Corn, Blueberries, And Almonds

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Whisk garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, sugar, and curry powder in a small bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, gradually add oil until emulsified; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

Combine brown rice and 1 cup water in a small saucepan; season lightly with salt. Bring to a simmer. Reduce heat, cover, and cook until water is absorbed and rice is tender, 45–50 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand 10 minutes, then spread out on a large rimmed baking sheet and let cool.
Cook wild rice in another small saucepan of boiling lightly salted water until tender, 35–45 minutes. Drain and spread out next to brown rice; let cool.
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.
Toss both rices, almonds, corn, blueberries, onion, and parsley in a medium bowl to combine. Drizzle with dressing and toss to coat. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Rice can be cooked 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.
